Description

  • Uses of RestoreBackupResponse in com.gpudb

    Methods in com.gpudb that return RestoreBackupResponse
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    RestoreBackupResponse
    GPUdb.restoreBackup(RestoreBackupRequest request)
    Restores database objects from a backup accessible via the data source specified by datasourceName.
    RestoreBackupResponse
    GPUdb.restoreBackup(String backupName, Map<String,String> restoreObjectsMap, String datasourceName, Map<String,String> options)
    Restores database objects from a backup accessible via the data source specified by datasourceName.

  • Uses of RestoreBackupResponse in com.gpudb.protocol

    Methods in com.gpudb.protocol that return RestoreBackupResponse
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    RestoreBackupResponse
    RestoreBackupResponse.setBackupId(long backupId)
    ID of the snapshot that was restored.
    RestoreBackupResponse
    RestoreBackupResponse.setBackupName(String backupName)
    Value of backupName.
    RestoreBackupResponse
    RestoreBackupResponse.setFailedObjects(Map<String,String> failedObjects)
    Database objects that failed to be restored and their associated types.
    RestoreBackupResponse
    RestoreBackupResponse.setInfo(Map<String,String> info)
    Additional information.
    RestoreBackupResponse
    RestoreBackupResponse.setRenamedObjects(Map<String,String> renamedObjects)
    Original and new names of database objects that were successfully restored and their associated types.
    RestoreBackupResponse
    RestoreBackupResponse.setRestoredBytes(long restoredBytes)
    Total size of data restored from backup.
    RestoreBackupResponse
    RestoreBackupResponse.setRestoredFiles(long restoredFiles)
    Total number of files restored from backup.
    RestoreBackupResponse
    RestoreBackupResponse.setRestoredObjects(Map<String,String> restoredObjects)
    Database objects that were successfully restored and their associated types.
    RestoreBackupResponse
    RestoreBackupResponse.setRestoredRecords(long restoredRecords)
    Total number of records restored from backup.
